heading: Retirement: retirement for years of service; selective early retirement
label: 15107 Retirement: retirement for years of service; selective early retirement

children.heading: .—Retirement for Years of Service
children.label: a .—Retirement for Years of Service
children.text: Sections 14507 through 14515 of this title shall apply to the retirement of officers in competitive categories of officers designated for purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Selective Early Retirement
children.label: b .—Selective Early Retirement
children.text: shall apply to the retirement of officers described in subsection (a).Section 14101(b) of this title
